message:
fix(web): Improve status derivation based on incident impact levels

Previously, deriveSystemStatus only checked if there were any active
incidents (count > 0) to determine degraded status. Now it properly
considers incident impact levels:
- critical impact → major_outage
- major impact → partial_outage
- minor impact → degraded

This provides more accurate status reporting to users.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
